hero.title: Landmark and complex projects: engineering at scale
hero.subtitle: We design, manufacture and install aluminum and glass solutions for large-scale structures: unitized facades, curtain walls and high-performance architectural fenestration.
hero.technicalBox1Desc: Prefabricated modular systems for fast on-site installation with millimeter dimensional control.
hero.technicalBox2Desc: Engineering of laminated and IGU glass for high-rise envelopes with maximum daylight utilization.

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.subtitle: Specialists in aluminum and glass with over 14 years of experience in Ecuador.

mission.title: Mission.
mission.banner: At ITVAL we transform spaces with precision and design
mission.body: To provide comprehensive solutions in glass, aluminum and metal structures. We are committed to delivering high-design products backed by a multidisciplinary team that guarantees safety, durability and aesthetics in every project — from private homes to large complexes.

profile.title: Company profile
profile.body: ITVAL is a company with highly qualified technical staff and a workforce with extensive experience in aluminum and glass. We put our experience and quality at your service to bring designers' big ideas to life, builders' safety requirements and clients' comfort. By using more efficient glass with lower U-values we reduce energy consumption for lighting, cooling and air conditioning. Aluminum and glass in construction is a great solution with a wide variety of resistant, efficient and aesthetic systems.

ethics.title: Professional ethics
ethics.body: We act with transparency, honesty and integrity in our relationships with clients, suppliers and collaborators. For us, trust is the foundation of every structure we build.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.body: We take a serious commitment to safety, delivery deadlines and material quality. We understand the impact of our work on the protection and aesthetics of buildings.

precision.title: Technical precision
precision.body: We pursue perfection in detail. From measurement to final installation, we apply rigorous technical standards so every glass and aluminum system performs flawlessly.

excellence.title: Service excellence
excellence.body: We combine over 14 years of experience with personalized attention, ensuring every solution — from the simplest to the most complex — exceeds client expectations.
